nodes.context: International outlaw motorcycle club formed in Perth, Australia in 1970.
Norwegian outlaw motorcycle gang patched over by Coffin Cheaters in 2004.
Norwegian outlaw motorcycle gang patched over by Coffin Cheaters in 2005.
Unrelated US club founded in early 1960s in southern California, no connection to Australian club.
Feeder club for the US Coffin Cheaters MC.
Outlaw motorcycle club in Western Australia in the 1980s.
Outlaw motorcycle club in Western Australia in the 1980s.
Outlaw motorcycle club in Western Australia in the 1980s.
New Zealand-based street gang that attempted to establish itself in Perth in 1989.

edges.evidence_quote: later 'patched over' two Norwegian gangs, Forbidden Few MC and Wizard MC, in 2004 and 2005 respectively.
edges.context: Coffin Cheaters absorbed Forbidden Few MC through patching over in 2004.

edges.evidence_quote: In 1989 these four gangs combined forces to violently eject the New Zealand-based street gang, the Mongrel Mob which was attempting to establish itself in Perth.
edges.context: Club Deroes, along with three other clubs, cooperated to eject the Mongrel Mob from Perth.
